Part.Source:
Event Start
loadwwpContext.Call(&WwpContext) &EmpCod = &WwpContext.EmpCod tbAliquotasPisCofins.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
UnnamedTable5.Width = 120 UnnamedTable15.Width = 35 UnnamedTable14.Width = 35 UnnamedTable13.Width = 35 UnnamedTable12.Width = 35 UnnamedTable11.Width = 35 UnnamedTable10.Width = 35 UnnamedTable9.Width = 35 UnnamedTable8.Width = 35 &NfsTotBasCofins.Visible = False &NfsTotBasPIS.Visible = False &SolCod.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNFS(!'Totais', !'Transmitir', false, &SessionGuid) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoCapa'
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' if &NfsSts <> Status_nFe.Autorizada and &NfsSts <> Status_Nfe.Cancelada prcGravaTotaisNFs.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &WizardData) Endif
wpNFS(!'Totais', !'Capa', false, &SessionGuid)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoDados'
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' if &NfsSts <> Status_nFe.Autorizada and &NfsSts <> Status_Nfe.Cancelada prcGravaTotaisNFs.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &WizardData) Endif
wpNFS(!'Totais', !'DadosNFSE', false, &SessionGuid)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoItens'
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' if &NfsSts <> Status_nFe.Autorizada and &NfsSts <> Status_Nfe.Cancelada prcGravaTotaisNFs.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &WizardData) Endif
wpNFS(!'Totais', !'Itens', false, &SessionGuid)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoTransmitir'
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' if &NfsSts <> Status_nFe.Autorizada and &NfsSts <> Status_Nfe.Cancelada prcGravaTotaisNFs.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &WizardData) prcNotaServicoTransmitida.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod) GeraXmlNFSe.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsFiLCod, &NfsCod, 'S', &WwpContext.PesCod, &SolCod)
&WizardData.Totais.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
//Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' //ADD o SOlCod wpNFS(!'Totais', !'Transmitir', false, &SessionGuid) Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
if 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &NfsTotBasCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotBasCofins &NfsTotBasPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotBasPIS &NfsTotSer = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotSer &NfsTotDesc = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotDesc &NfsVlrTot = &WizardData.Totais.NfsVlrTot &SolCod = &WizardData.Totais.SolCod &NfsRetISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetISS &NfsRetCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCofins &NfsRetIR = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetIR &NfsRetCPP = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCPP &NfsRetPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetPIS &NfsRetINSS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetINSS &NfsRetCSLL = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCSLL &NfsRetOut = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetOut &NfsTotISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotISS &NfsTotCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCofins &NfsTotIR = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotIR &NfsTotCPP = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCPP &NfsTotPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotPIS &NfsTotINSS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotINSS &NfsTotCSLL = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCSLL &NfsTotOut = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotOut &NfsPerISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerISS &NfsPerCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCofins &NfsPerIR = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerIR &NfsPerCPP = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCPP &NfsPerPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerPIS &NfsPerINSS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerINSS &NfsPerCSLL = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL &NfsPerOut = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerOut &NfsTribAprMun = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprMun &NfsTribAprEst = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprEst &NfsTribAprFed = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprFed &NfsPerCSLL_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL_Nac &NfsPerCPP_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCPP_Nac &NfsPerIR_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerIR_Nac &NfsCstPisCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsCstPisCofins &NfsRetPisCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetPisCofins &NfsTotCofins_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCofins_Nac &NfsPerCofins_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCofins_Nac &NfsTotPIS_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotPIS_Nac &NfsPerPIS_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerPIS_Nac &NfsRetISSNov = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetISSNov &NfsTotISS_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotISS_Nac &NfsPerISS_Nac = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerISS_Nac
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod &NfsCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod
if &NfsCod = 0 wwNotasServico.Link() Else For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
if NfsTipNF = 'S' &NfsTotDesc.Enabled = 0
totaisNFNacional.Visible = 1 totaisNFSold.Visible = 0
&NfsTotCofins_Nac = NfsTotCofins &NfsPerCofins_Nac = NfsPerCofins &NfsTotPIS_Nac = NfsTotPIS &NfsPerPIS_Nac = NfsPerPIS &NfsTotISS_Nac = NfsTotISS &NfsPerISS_Nac = NfsPerISS &NfsPerCSLL_Nac = NfsPerCSLL &NfsPerIR_Nac = NfsPerIR &NfsPerCPP_Nac = NfsPerCPP
&NfsRetISSNov = NfsRetISSNov &NfsCstPisCofins = NfsCstPisCofins &NfsRetPisCofins = NfsRetPisCofins if &NfsRetPisCofins.IsEmpty() &NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisCofinsNaoRetido Endif
&NfsTribAprFed = NfsTribAprFed &NfsTribAprEst = NfsTribAprEst &NfsTribAprMun = NfsTribAprMun
tbAliquotasPisCofins.Visible = (NfsCstPisCofins <> PisCofinsServico.CST00 and (not NfsCstPisCofins.IsEmpty() and not NfsCstPisCofins.IsNull())) Else totaisNFNacional.Visible = 0 totaisNFSold.Visible = 1 Endif
&NfsVlrTot = NfsVlrTot &NfsFilCod = NfsFilCod &NfsTotBasCofins = NfsTotBasCofins &NfsTotBasPIS = NfsTotBasPIS &NfsTotDesc = NfsTotDesc &NfsTotISS = NfsTotISS &NfsTotCofins = NfsTotCofins &NfsTotIR = NfsTotIR &NfsTotCPP = NfsTotCPP &NfsTotPIS = NfsTotPIS &NfsTotINSS = NfsTotINSS &NfsTotCSLL = NfsTotCSLL &NfsTotOut = NfsTotOut &NfsPerISS = NfsPerISS &NfsPerCofins = NfsPerCofins &NfsPerIR = NfsPerIR &NfsPerCPP = NfsPerCPP &NfsPerPIS = NfsPerPIS &NfsPerINSS = NfsPerINSS &NfsPerCSLL = NfsPerCSLL &NfsPerOut = NfsPerOut
&NfsTotSer = NfsTotSer
&NfsRetISS = NfsRetISS &NfsRetCofins = NfsRetCofins &NfsRetIR = NfsRetIR &NfsRetCPP = NfsRetCPP &NfsRetPIS = NfsRetPIS &NfsRetINSS = NfsRetINSS &NfsRetCSLL = NfsRetCSLL &NfsRetOut = NfsRetOut
BtnItens.Visible = (NfsTipNF <> 'S')
&NfsSts = NfsSts if &NfsSts = Status_nFe.Autorizada or &NfsSts = Status_Nfe.Cancelada BtnTransmitir.Visible = 0 Endif
Exit EndFor EndIf Endif
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
if &NfsSts <> Status_nFe.Autorizada and &NfsSts <> Status_Nfe.Cancelada
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotBasCofins = &NfsTotBasCofins &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotBasPIS = &NfsTotBasPIS &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc &WizardData.Totais.NfsVlrTot = &NfsVlrTot &WizardData.Totais.SolCod = &SolCod &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetISS = &NfsRetISS &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCofins = &NfsRetCofins &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetIR = &NfsRetIR &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCPP = &NfsRetCPP &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetPIS = &NfsRetPIS &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetINSS = &NfsRetINSS &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCSLL = &NfsRetCSLL &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetOut = &NfsRetOut &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotISS = &NfsTotISS &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCofins = &NfsTotCofins &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotIR = &NfsTotIR &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCPP = &NfsTotCPP &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotPIS = &NfsTotPIS &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotINSS = &NfsTotINSS &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCSLL = &NfsTotCSLL &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotOut = &NfsTotOut &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerISS = &NfsPerISS &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCofins = &NfsPerCofins &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerIR = &NfsPerIR &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCPP = &NfsPerCPP &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerPIS = &NfsPerPIS &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerINSS = &NfsPerINSS &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL = &NfsPerCSLL &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerOut = &NfsPerOut &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprMun = &NfsTribAprMun &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprEst = &NfsTribAprEst &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprFed = &NfsTribAprFed &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL_Nac = &NfsPerCSLL_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCPP_Nac = &NfsPerCPP_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerIR_Nac = &NfsPerIR_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsCstPisCofins = &NfsCstPisCofins &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetPisCofins = &NfsRetPisCofins &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCofins_Nac = &NfsTotCofins_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCofins_Nac = &NfsPerCofins_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotPIS_Nac = &NfsTotPIS_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerPIS_Nac = &NfsPerPIS_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetISSNov = &NfsRetISSNov &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotISS_Nac = &NfsTotISS_Nac &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerISS_Nac = &NfsPerISS_Nac &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Endif
EndSub
Event &NfsPerCofins_Nac.ControlValueChanged
&NfsTotCofins_Nac = round(&NfsPerCofins_Nac * (&NfsTotSer- &NfsTotDesc) ,2)
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerPIS_Nac.ControlValueChanged
&NfsTotPIS_Nac = round(&NfsPerCofins_Nac * (&NfsTotSer- &NfsTotDesc) ,2)
EndEvent
Event &NfsCstPisCofins.IsValid
tbAliquotasPisCofins.Visible = (&NfsCstPisCofins <> PisCofinsServico.CST00)
EndEvent
Event &NfsTotDesc.ControlValueChanged
&NfsVlrTot = &NfsTotSer-&NfsTotDesc
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerISS.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerISS > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotISS = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerISS/100) Else &NfsTotISS = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerCofins.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerCofins > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotCofins = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerCofins/100) Else &NfsTotCofins = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerIR.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerIR > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotIR = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerIR/100) Else &NfsTotIR = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerCPP.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerCPP > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotCPP = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerCPP/100) Else &NfsTotCPP = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerPIS.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerPIS > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotPIS = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerPIS/100) Else &NfsTotPIS = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerINSS.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerINSS > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotINSS = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerINSS/100) Else &NfsTotINSS = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerCSLL.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerCSLL > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotCSLL = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerCSLL/100) Else &NfsTotCSLL = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfsPerOut.ControlValueChanged
if &NfsPerOut > 0 and &NfsVlrTot > 0 &NfsTotOut = &NfsVlrTot * (&NfsPerOut/100) Else &NfsTotOut = 0 Endif
EndEvent
